creator: marietto2008@gmail.com
text:
According with this post :

https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/vcl-bug-it-crashes-when-i-open-a-video-using-vdpau-video-decoder.91484/#post-636313

it seems that jmos said that this nvidia-driver port update :

https://www.freshports.org/x11/nvidia-driver/

solved the VLC problem.
